summary: Website for STA Sea Foods, a fresh fish storage facility. The site will showcase the business with sections for location, contact information, and services.

existing_features.title: Create a single-page website for 'STA Sea Foods' with a hero section featuring the company name, tagline (fresh fish storage facility), and a prominent call-to-action button to contact the business.
Add a 'Our Services' section that describes the core offerings of a fresh fish storage facility, including cold storage, fish handling, preservation, and distribution support.
Add a 'Location' section that displays the company's location with a placeholder address and a static map embed or visual map placeholder card indicating the facility's location.
Add a 'Contact Us' section that displays placeholder contact information including phone number, email address, and business hours for STA Sea Foods.
Add a sticky navigation bar with links to all page sections (Home, Services, Location, Contact) and the STA Sea Foods logo/name. Include a mobile-responsive hamburger menu.

Apply a maritime, ocean-inspired visual theme using deep navy blue, seafoam green, and crisp white tones with clean sans-serif typography, wave or water texture accents, and a professional layout that conveys freshness and reliability for a seafood storage business.

Update the Contact Us section (Contact.tsx) to display the real email address 'fresh.sea.foods.sta@gmail.com' and two phone numbers: 9791259640 (primary) and 9677871188 (secondary), replacing any placeholder contact information.
Update the Footer component (Footer.tsx) to also reflect the real contact details: email 'fresh.sea.foods.sta@gmail.com' and phone numbers 9791259640 and 9677871188, replacing any placeholder values.
Remove the 'Made with Caffeine' branding mark from all pages and components, including the Footer and any other location where it appears.

Replace the existing decorative SVG map placeholder in the Location section (frontend/src/components/Location.tsx) with an interactive map centered at coordinates 8.120236, 77.454371. Use Leaflet.js (react-leaflet) to embed the map. The map must display a marker at the exact coordinates (8.120236, 77.454371) with a popup label identifying the STA Sea Foods facility. The map must be fully responsive (100% width, fixed height such as 400px on desktop, 250px on mobile) and styled to complement the existing maritime theme (navy/seafoam color palette). Retain the address details and info cards already present in the section.

Update the address displayed in the Location section (frontend/src/components/Location.tsx) to: Thuckalay, Kalkulam Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India. Replace any existing placeholder or previously shown address text with this real address across all address display elements, info cards, and any embedded map popup labels within the Location section.

In the Hero section (frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx), update the 'Contact Us' and 'Our Services' CTA buttons to have a translucent/frosted semi-transparent appearance. Apply a semi-transparent background (e.g., white or navy with low opacity), a subtle backdrop-blur effect, and a light border to achieve a frosted-glass look that complements the existing maritime navy/seafoam theme. Ensure text remains legible and hover states are preserved.

new_feature_requests.summary: Display company location on the website
Showcase fresh fish storage facility services
Integrate interactive map with coordinates 8.120236, 77.454371, responsive, themed, with marker
Update location address to: Thuckalay, Kalkulam Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India
Make the Contact Us and Our Services buttons translucent/frosted semi-transparent styling
